text.title: SDD Workflows Navigation Hub Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the workflows navigation hub methodology end-to-end.

step.name: list-feature-docs
step.action: List files in the directory; identify spec.md / design.md / implementation-plan.md presence.
step.decision-gate: If feature dir does not exist, emit blocker route and STOP.

step.name: read-statuses
step.action: For each present doc, read frontmatter `status` field. Missing frontmatter or missing status → treat as `Draft`.

step.name: compute-active-phase
step.action: Apply earliest-non-Accepted-input rule: spec missing/Draft → spec; spec Accepted + design missing/Draft → design; design Accepted + plan missing/Draft → plan; all Accepted → execution.

step.name: emit-route
step.action: Map active_phase → next_methodology path; verify path exists on disk; populate route record; if path missing, set active_phase=blocked + name the blocker.
step.decision-gate: If next_methodology path does not resolve, BLOCK and name the blocker.
